description: OlympiadMAS — 4 test-based multi-agent olympiads (+ IEO Business Case rubric-based pilot)
note_on_30: Collect one full published team task per slot (internal sub-parts stay together). Combine across years/contests to reach 30 where history allows; some olympiads have fewer than 30 available.

olympiads.name: International Junior Science Olympiad — Practical (Team)

gold_scores.notes: Marking schemes in answer PDFs. Gold practical team = top /40.

olympiads.collection_strategy: One full team practical per IJSO year; ~30 editions since 2004

olympiads.name: International Economics Olympiad — Business Case
olympiads.collection_strategy: One full business case per IEO year (2021–2025 available so far)

olympiads.name: International Linguistics Olympiad — Team Contest

gold_scores.notes: Solutions PDF per year. Human gold e.g. 200.0/200 (2025 Taiwan).

olympiads.collection_strategy: One full team contest per year; 2003–2025

olympiads.name: International Olympiad on Astronomy and Astrophysics — Group Competition

gold_scores.notes: Marking schemes in solution PDFs. Winner = fastest team.

olympiads.collection_strategy: One full group competition per IOAA edition (2007–2024)

olympiads.name: ARML Power Contest

gold_scores.notes: Solution PDFs published each season. Top teams 36–40/40.

olympiads.collection_strategy: One full power round per contest season (~2/year since 1994)

olympiads.name: ARML National Meet — Team Round

gold_scores.notes: Solution sections in national meet PDFs and 2009–2014 book.

olympiads.collection_strategy: One team round per national meet year

olympiads.name: ARML National Meet — Power Round

gold_scores.notes: Solution sections in national meet PDFs and 2009–2014 book.

olympiads.collection_strategy: One power round per national meet year

olympiads.name: ARML Local
olympiads.collection_strategy: One local team round per year from ARML book

olympiads.name: World Scholar's Cup — Collaborative Writing

gold_scores.notes: Published essay prompts and rubrics per annual season. Top team scores available from leaderboards.

olympiads.collection_strategy: One collaborative writing portfolio (3 essays on shared theme) per annual WSC season

olympiads.name: Philip C. Jessup International Law Moot Court Competition

gold_scores.notes: Compromis (problem) published annually since 1960. Winning memorials available via Jessup Compendium / HeinOnline.

olympiads.collection_strategy: One Compromis per year; agents write memorials arguing both Applicant and Respondent sides

olympiads.name: International Informatics Olympiad in Teams (IIOT)

gold_scores.notes: Task statements and results published at iio.team/competition/tasks. Scoring based on automated judge (accepted / wrong answer).

olympiads.collection_strategy: One full contest set per IIOT edition (international round); teams of 4 solve algorithmic problems in 3–4 hours

olympiads.name: ICPC — International Collegiate Programming Contest

gold_scores.notes: World Finals problem sets and solutions published since 1976 at problems.icpc.io and icpc.kattis.com.

olympiads.collection_strategy: One World Finals problem set per year; teams of 3 solve algorithmic problems on 1 computer in 5 hours
